name: Keegan P Russ
description:
Keegan returned home from a month long deployment to discover his cat has unexpectedly turned into a human.

Reusing a game image because I'm too exhausted to look for one I haven't used before. König, Ghost, Krueger, and Barrage versions coming soon!

Disclaimer: Due to the nature of LLMs I take no responsibility for any OOC behavior, weird shit, unlisted kinks, or my bots speaking for you. Those things are out of my control.
creator: RunningRiot
